content: Illustrative Morningstar DBRS-style corporate credit methodology summary used for reconciliation narration. Core financial factors: Leverage carries a 35% weight; Interest Coverage carries 20%. Qualitative factors: Business Risk carries roughly 20% and a Sector Treatment factor carries about 20-25%. This methodology tends toward a standalone, sector-conservative view and is more reserved about parent-support uplift than some peers, which can produce a lower notch on the same fundamentals. When citing this methodology, agents may say 'per this Morningstar DBRS-style methodology, leverage weight is 35% and group-support uplift is applied conservatively.'
disclaimer: Illustrative methodology summary — not official Morningstar DBRS methodology or ratings criteria.
